source_match.notes: Metadata identity matches source bundle: AQA GCSE Biology 8461, Version 1.0 21 April 2016, valid from 2016 ongoing. Checksum and local archive ref recorded.

source_traceability.notes: High-impact conclusions map to page-map references. Page references use printed/footer page numbers. Source bundle accuracy-verdict is medium due to single-channel extraction and same-agent review; builder has accepted these risks and they are recorded as P2.

topic_tree.notes: Topics cover all 8 specification sections 4.1-4.8 with stable topic_ids. Scope/out_of_scope present. Required practicals and WS/MS/AT are treated as assessment/skill links, not regular topics.

assessment_model.notes: Paper 1/Paper 2 structure, AO weightings, Foundation/Higher tiers, command words, question styles, difficulty ladder, confidence thresholds and generation_constraints all present. lesson_use correctly disabled for v1.

out_of_scope.notes: Out-of-scope rules clear: A-Level Biology, Combined Science content outside 8461, Foundation/Higher mismatches.

examples.notes: 3 correct classification, 2 misclassification, 2 out-of-scope, 1 cross-topic examples provided. Meets minimum requirement for classification use.

portability.notes: No platform-specific dependencies. SKILL.md and templates do not mention EduFlow, Feishu, ClaudeTeam or any runtime.

p2.issue: retrieved_at is 'unknown'; should be recorded when official source is re-downloaded or confirmed.
Two-column layout (left assessable content, right WS/MS/AT skill opportunities) was inferred from pdftotext output, not visually verified.
Only a summary list of 10 required practicals is included; full AT/WS/MS links and practical details were not fully audited.
Source extraction_confidence is medium (single-channel text extraction, same-agent review). Reviewer accepts this risk for validated status; independent re-review recommended before active.
